entries.title: Gorgeous Things Summer Briefing
entries.description: A short overview of the newest ecosystem changes.

content.markdown:
# Gorgeous Things Summer Briefing

New improvements are available across the ecosystem.

## Highlights

- New plugin and General System update notifications
- Contextual documentation in the Editor Help menu
- Faster update-carousel page switching

> Thank you for building with Gorgeous Things.

entries.title: Gorgeous Core 1.1.0 is ready
entries.description: An update is available for the installed Gorgeous Core plugin.

entries.title: Common UI Foundation 2.0.0 is available
entries.description: This only appears when CommonUIFoundation is recorded as installed for this project.
